$description.$value: Min/max width for the page-container component in the Figma library, at the xs (extra-small) viewport. Mode-scoped: applies when the xs viewport mode is active. max_width is the xs range end; min_width is the minimum page width the system supports — the xs range starts at 0px, below the supported floor.

min_width.$description: Minimum width of a page container in the xs viewport — the minimum page width the system supports. Does not reference the xs range start, which is 0px.

max_width.$description: Maximum width of a page container in the xs viewport.
